"'''Jaws of the Sarlacc'''" is the tenth and final adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign. It is written by [[Rodney Thompson]] and released [[October 28]], [[2009]].

==Plot summary==
The players destroy the [[Sarlacc Project]]'s [[Super Star Destroyer prototype]] with the assistance of [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Alya Aldrete|Alya]] and [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]].
